title: DevOps Engineer Intern
description:
About SailPoint:
SailPoint is the leader in identity security for the cloud enterprise. Our identity security solutions secure and enable thousands of companies worldwide, giving our customers unmatched visibility into the entirety of their digital workforce, ensuring workers have the right access to do their job – no more, no less.
Built on a foundation of AI and ML, our Identity Security Cloud Platform, Atlas delivers the right level of access to the right identities and resources at the right time—matching the scale, velocity, and changing needs of today’s cloud-oriented, modern enterprise.
US Internship Program:
Your internship will begin June 8th, 2026 and run until August 14th, 2026.
The first week of your internship will be held in-person at our Headquarters in Austin, TX
Travel and lodging will be provided
Must be authorized to work in the US without sponsorship. No Visa sponsor available.
What You'll Do:
The DevOps Engineer Intern will take part in several exciting projects around cloud automation, CI/CD, and internal tool development.
Work in an agile, collaborative environment to build, deploy, configure and maintain cloud-based systems
Pair with development teams to enable a continuous integration environment that sustains high productivity levels
Automate and optimize processes using tools like Jenkins, Chef, Docker, Terraform, and the majority of the services AWS provides
Design and Implement tools for automated deployment and monitoring of multiple environments
Develop automation scripts in a variety of scripting languages to improve the performance and scalability of various projects
Apply CI/CD principles and methodologies to continuously deploy valuate software to our end users
Apply software engineering knowledge to architect solutions that scale well and provide maximum performance and uptime
Apply organizational and communication skills to handle multiple job functions across multiple product lines, projects and various technologies in a fast-placed, agile environment
Who You Are:
Highly motivated, talented, energetic and innately curious problem-solver
Possess strong verbal and written communication skills
Great at solving problems; debugging; and designing & implementing solutions to complex technical problems
Familiar with operating systems such as Linux, Windows, iOS and Android
Possess a basic understanding of programming/scripting in a language such as Java, GoLang, Bash, Python or Ruby
Internship Intended Benefits:
1-on-1 mentorship
Opportunity to work in a fast-paced environment in a fantastic culture
Exposure to open source technologies in business-impacting applications
Networking with team members and employees with widespread skillsets across the company
Opportunity to automate and develop solutions to exciting and challenging real world problems
We will help you acquire specific skills where needed to help launch your career in DevOps Engineering.
To join the team you will need the following:
Pursing a Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Computer Science, MIS, or a related technical field.
Knowledge and/or experience with Jenkins (CI/CD principles)
Knowledge and/or experience with cloud technologies (AWS, Azure, etc.)
Knowledge and/or experience with GoLang / Python / Java / Bash Scripting
Must have knowledge and experience with LinuxAll qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or veteran status.
